title: Craftable/uncraftable cowbwebs
description: Allows you to craft cowbwebs into strings, and craft strings into cowbwebs.
body:
bedrock edition used to have a feature where you can craft cowbwebs into strings but it got removed for parity(thanks Mojang) this datapack/ mod brings it back alongside the edition of being able to craft strings into cowbwebs 
![The crafting recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0139ad1fb0fd7aca866914e6c0e84d5cf82c4304.jpeg)
